title: Remove REST /api and migrate UI to GraphQL
description: Remove REST endpoints under /api and refactor the embedded /ui page to use GraphQL queries and mutations for all management operations.
design: Keep webhook receiver paths unchanged; introduce GraphQL helper functions in UI JS and map existing REST flows to schema operations.
acceptance_criteria: Server no longer registers /api routes, UI token/request/global-var operations work through /graphql, and tests/build pass for updated behavior.

title: Write scripting and recipes documentation
description: Document script runtime, helper APIs, limits, and practical recipe patterns for realistic mocks.
design: Group recipes by outcome: stateful APIs, conditional responses, delays, and failures.
acceptance_criteria: Scripting page includes request object, helper functions, error behavior, and at least five recipes.

title: Write REST and GraphQL API reference pages
description: Create endpoint and operation reference pages with practical examples and common patterns.
design: Use tables for signatures and short snippets for copy-paste usage.
acceptance_criteria: REST and GraphQL pages cover main create/read/update/delete flows, claim flow, and globals.

title: Design wiki structure and landing page
description: Create a professional Home page with navigation, audience-oriented entry points, and links to all major docs.
design: Use concise sections and callouts so first-time users can pick a path quickly.
acceptance_criteria: Home page clearly segments getting started, reference, and operations docs; all links resolve.

title: Document quick start and core concepts
description: Add pages that explain installation/run flow and core behavior such as tokens, expiration, and agent identity.
design: Reuse proven examples from README and split explanation from reference.
acceptance_criteria: New users can run the service and understand token lifecycle and ownership without reading source.

title: Professional wiki documentation project
description: Build a complete and navigable GitHub wiki for ai-http-bin so users can onboard quickly and find operational details without scanning source code.
design: Use concise docs split by intent: quick start, concepts, API, scripting, recipes, operations, and contributor guidance. Keep examples aligned with current README behavior.
acceptance_criteria: Wiki has a structured landing page, core concept docs, API references, scripting guidance, operations/troubleshooting pages, and clear cross-links between pages.

title: Make README quick start use release binary
description: Update README so first-time users are not expected to have Go installed; binary release path should be the primary quick start, with source usage secondary.
close_reason: Updated README quick start and requirements to use release binaries by default, with Go only for source development

title: Add binary release configuration
description: Configure releases so users can download ai-http-bin binaries without installing Go, based on the provided GoReleaser example.
close_reason: Added GoReleaser config, GitHub Actions release workflow, and README binary release instructions

title: Improve README newcomer clarity
description: Improve README.md so newcomers unfamiliar with the project can understand prerequisites, mental model, and quick start flow.
close_reason: Improved README newcomer clarity and added wiki documentation link

title: Update README and wiki for GraphQL-only API
description: Docs still reference removed /api REST endpoints and should be rewritten to match GraphQL-only management API.
acceptance_criteria: README and wiki pages no longer show /api endpoint examples and use GraphQL flows consistently.

title: Add doc comments to test helper functions
description:
Document all test helper functions with proper Go doc comments.

Helper functions in e2e_test.go:
- client() - creates resty.Client with base URL and headers
- createToken(t) - creates a token with default settings
- sendWebhook(t, tokenURL, method, body, contentType) - posts to token URL
- ptr[T](v T) - generic pointer helper

Helper functions in e2e_fields_test.go:
- tokenRequestsField(t, tokenID) - fetches token.requests via GraphQL

Helper functions in script_test.go:
- createTokenWithScript(t, script) - creates token with JS script
- setScript(t, tokenID, script) - sets script via SetScript mutation
- hitToken(t, tokenID, method, path, body) - sends request to token endpoint
- webhookResponse wrapper type and methods (mustStatus, mustJSONField)
- WebSocket helpers: writeWS, expectWSType, readWSData, firstRequest

Each helper should have a doc comment explaining its purpose and typical usage.

title: Apply comprehensive doc format to remaining test functions
description:
Update test function documentation to follow comprehensive format: API tested → Scenario → Expectations.

Currently ~40 test functions have been updated (see e2e_test.go:111, e2e_fields_test.go:282, script_test.go:96 for examples).

Remaining functions still need the comprehensive three-part format applied:
- Line 1: API being tested (e.g., 'tests the Token query API')
- Line 2: Scenario (what the test does)
- Line 3: Expects (what outcome should occur)

Files to update:
- e2e_test.go: TestGetToken, TestGetTokenNotFound, TestListTokens, TestUpdateToken, TestToggleCors, TestDeleteToken, TestWebhookUnknownTokenReturns410, TestWebhookCustomResponse, TestWebhookStatusCodeOverrideViaPath, TestWebhookCORSHeaders, TestWebhookNoCORSHeadersWhenDisabled, TestGetRequest, TestListRequestsPagination, TestListRequestsSortingNewest, TestDeleteRequest, TestClearRequests, TestDeleteTokenAlsoDeletesRequests, TestHealthEndpoint

- e2e_fields_test.go: TestTokenCapturesCreatorIPAndUserAgent, TestTokenRequestsField, TestWebhookTimeout, TestRequestCapturesURLWithQueryString, TestRequestCapturesHostname, TestRequestCapturesSubPath, TestRequestCapturesHeaders, TestRequestCapturesQueryParams, TestRequestCapturesFormData, TestRequestCapturesIPUserAgentCreatedAt, TestReceiverDoesNotShadowManagementRoutes, TestRequestsDefaultPagination, TestPlaygroundServesHTML, TestSubscriptionRequestReceived, TestLargePayloadTruncated

- script_test.go: TestScriptReadsRequestMethod, TestScriptReadsRequestBody, TestScriptReadsRequestPath, TestScriptReadsQueryParams, TestScriptGlobalVarPersistsAcrossRequests, TestScriptStatefulMockTodoAPI, TestScriptErrorReturns500WithHeader, TestScriptTimeout, TestSetScriptMutation, TestScriptOverridesStaticResponse, TestGlobalVarsRESTCRUD, TestGlobalVarsGraphQL, TestScriptCannotAccessOtherTokenVars, TestScriptRetrySimulation

title: Add contribution and roadmap pages
description: Create contributor-facing docs and a roadmap outline to set expectations.
design: Keep contribution steps short and actionable; roadmap uses themed sections.
acceptance_criteria: Contributing page explains setup and doc contribution workflow; roadmap page defines near-term priorities.

title: Write operations and troubleshooting docs
description: Add self-hosting and troubleshooting guidance for local and CI use.
design: Focus on symptoms, cause, and exact command-based resolution.
acceptance_criteria: Ops page includes environment and runtime behavior; troubleshooting page covers likely failure modes and fixes.
